the best in the midwest. period.
new york style bagels

 
 
order online
 
 
 
 
 

TRADITIONAL INGREDIENTS

The same ingredients authentic bagel makers have trusted for decades, made with the highest quality versions we can get. starting with unbleached, never-bromated flour.

Authentic Bagels

Each bagel is carefully rolled
by hand using a method PASSED DOWN GENERATIONS dating back to 1906. We Kettle Boil and Bake fresh every morning.

inventive sandwiches

our sandwiches are loaded
with unique flavor combinations & the best seasonally fresh ingredients around

 
 
 

the Menu

 
Chicago
Madison
 
 

Gotham Bagels are the best in the midwest, period.

Gotham Bagels was started in 2006 by a New Yorker with a dream - a dream of bringing authentic, delicious, New York-Style bagels to the Midwest!

Get the whole story
 
 

Need More than a Dozen Bagels?

Cater with Gotham Bagels! We’ve got platters for every occasion, just make sure you don’t forget the cream cheese!

Madison
Chicago
 
 

In loving memory of Kenneth Scharf (1956-2021) Pictured here with fellow Gotham Bagels co-founder Joe Gaglio.
